prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 2D battle VFX texture for a Pokemon-style grass attack
Primary request: create vine-like fracture accents for a grass impact burst
Scene/backdrop: transparent background, isolated effect only, no background
Subject: effect only, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI
Style/medium: premium polished game VFX asset with crisp botanical fracture detail and elegant curvature
Composition/framing: branching vine lines and crack accents radiating from a small center, tightly framed for compositing, isolated support layer
Lighting/mood: tense impact accent, organic and controlled
Color palette: deep emerald, moss green, pale lime highlights, muted yellow-green glints
Materials/textures: thin vine strands, subtle bark-like texture, sharp fracture edges, clean glow on transparency
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no environment, no card frame
Avoid: beams, trails, petals, flowers, black background, checkerboard, solid backdrop, tangled roots dominating the frame
Important negative constraints: keep the accents delicate and directional, avoid making the layer into a full projectile or beam, preserve legibility in battle overlays
